title: SpaceworldMons [Cobblemon]
description: Adds in Beta Pokémon into your Cobblemon world!
body:
![SpaceworldMons Banner Image featuring a bunch of new mons!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bf7c4eae4ac88b582e154ad982e100f1180c07f_0.webp)

**SpaceworldMons** adds **over 70** Beta Pokémon from _an era long gone_ to your Cobblemon world!

> _There's too many mons to list all of them and their evo methods, so here's the roster from the previous update!_
<details>
<summary>List of Pokémon available</summary>

Generation 1
- **Barunda** the Balloon Pokémon!
- **Kotora,** who evolves into **Raitora** at Level 31
- **Gorochu** - Evolves from Raichu with via Trade

Generation 2
- **Kindachi,** a curious looking Racoon Pokémon
- **Norowara**, who can evolve into **Pangshi** at any time
- **Plux** - Evolves from Pinsir when traded with a Metal Coat
- **Tsubomitto** - Evolves from Weepinbel with a Sun Stone
- **Turbann** - Evolves from Shellder when Slowpoke is in the Party
- **Madamuu** - Evolves from Farfetch'd with High Friendship
- **Animon** - Evolves from Ditto while being traded with a Metal Coat
- **Shibirefugu** - Evolves from Qwilfish at Level 18
- **Koma-Inu**, a potental Legendary Pokémon that rarely spawns in Cherry Groves...

Generation 3
- **Evolotto**, who has the mysterious ability to evolve into **ANY** Pokémon with High Friendship!
- **Psykou**, who evolves into **Psyking** at Level 30
- **Ponku**, who evolves into **Tanpu** at Level 31
- **Kakogame**, **Warabbit**, **Penpen**, **Komari** and **Ascenshark** - All single-stage 'Mons

Generation 5
- **Kaburion** - Evolves from Karrablast at Level 30
</details>


### How to Install
**Place the .jar file in your Mods folder!** This counts as a datapack/resource pack combo, and installing like this lets it work in all your worlds!


### Help Section
<details>
<summary>Help! /pokespawn isn't working!</summary>

'Mons in this pack are stored the same in the files as regional variants for compatability with other Datapacks. The command to properly spawn in the models is listed below.
```
/pokespawn [species] spaceworldmons
```
Other commands like /pokegive and natural spawning/evolving work as intended, so no worries there!
</details>

<details>
<summary>Help! The Beta Johto Starters don't show up in the starter selection!</summary>

We decided not to include data in the base pack for this, as if you play the pack with other datapacks that also include their own starters, one will overwrite the other. Here's how you can add the Beta Johto starters in yourself!

- Go to your mods menu and search for Cobblemon, and click on the 'Configure...' button.
- From there, search "starter" in the search bar. You will see a label titled "Export Starter Config". You will want this set to **Yes**
- Open the installation of Minecraft you have your game set up in, now you should have a 'starter.json' file inside the config/cobblemon folder. 
- - If you don't see it, go to your worlds screen and select 'Create a New World', you don't have to create a new world, this should just generate the file.
- Wherever you want the starters to show up (ideally before Johto and after Kanto), paste the JSON below in-between the entries:
```
    {
      "name": "SW97",
      "displayName": "SW97",
      "pokemon": [
        "Chikorita spaceworld_bias=beta_johto level=10",
        "Honoguma spaceworldmons level=10",
        "Kurusu spaceworldmons level=10"
      ]
    },
```
![Starter selection including the SW97 Trio!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28a45f097fb48ec94e16d6a08a93f1dbb82755dc.png)

Save, and you're done! They should now appear as starter options in any world you create.
Include this in your server's configs to have them show up if you're planning on adding the pack in your multiplayer worlds.
</details>
